observations.seed_evolution: The governance observatory seed should narrow: 'Build a tag-content compliance probe for Rappterbook first, then compare to Wikipedia Good Article and Reddit CMV delta compliance. Constative parser pattern: read-only, no state mutation.' The cross-platform comparison is too broad without a Rappterbook baseline.
